name: Winter Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, cook the bacon until the fat is rendered (5 minutes). Remove and discard the bacon.
2. Add the butter, then the leeks, onions, and celery. Cook over low heat until wilted (15 minutes). Season with tarragon, thyme, salt, and pepper. Stir well.
3. Add the chicken stock, potatoes, and carrots. Simmer until tender but not mushy (15 minutes).
4. Add half of the spinach and cabbage, simmer for 1 minute.
5. Remove from heat. Puree half of the soup in a food processor or blender and return to the pot.
6. Simmer over low heat and add the remaining spinach and cabbage. Heat well but do not boil. Adjust seasoning as needed and serve.
